ce.anomalysubscription.CfnAbout: The `AWS::CE::AnomalySubscription` resource is a Cost Explorer resource type that associates a monitor, threshold, and list of subscribers. It delivers notifications about anomalies detected by a monitor that exceeds a threshold. The content consists of the detailed metadata and the current status of the `AnomalySubscription` object.

ce.anomalysubscription.Frequency.Description: The frequency that anomaly reports are sent over email.

ce.anomalysubscription.MonitorArnList.Description: A list of cost anomaly monitors.

ce.anomalysubscription.Subscribers.Description: A list of subscribers to notify.

ce.anomalysubscription.Threshold.Description: The dollar value that triggers a notification if the threshold is exceeded.
